reference: It looks like you might have passed a small stone from your urinary tract. If the blood in your semen persists, then contact your doctor. Also, if you are over fifty years of age, please contact your doctor, as you will need your prostate examined with a finger and have a blood test called prostate-specific antigen done.
text: It looks like you might have passed a small strain from the urinary tract. If the blood in your semen persists, then contact a doctor. Also, if you are over 50 years of age, please contact a doctor, as you will need a prostate appointment with a finger and have a blood test called prostate-specific antigen drawing.
